overall.description: First-person exploration of V's apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a bathroom and moving through a neon-lit living space featuring cyberpunk aesthetics mixed with traditional decor. The camera moves smoothly through the environment, revealing detailed interior elements including a bar area, holographic lighting, decorative vases, and a retro arcade machine.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact bathroom with toilet and glass block partition wall

events.description: camera rises from toilet level to standing height
exiting the bathroom through the glass block wall into the main living area

agents.ego_description: rising from a crouched position and moving toward the bathroom exit

entered.detail: white ceramic toilet with water visible in the bowl
translucent green-tinted glass block partition wall separating bathroom from living area
white towel hanging on a wall-mounted rack

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close-up view of a toilet bowl in a dimly lit bathroom. The camera rises to standing height, revealing a glass block wall and a hanging white towel before moving through the doorway into the main apartment space.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bar area with neon accent lighting

events.description: interaction prompt appears for alcohol bottle on the counter
moving into area with stronger cyan and magenta neon lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar counter and examining the items arranged on the surface

entered.detail: dark wooden bar counter with various bottles and items on top
tall bar stool with metallic finish
illuminated holographic signage glowing with cyan and magenta light
retro-style red radio on the counter
large leafy plant in a pot on the counter

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bathroom, the scene opens into a cyberpunk-style bar area illuminated by vibrant neon lights. The camera approaches a counter featuring a retro radio, a potted plant, and alcohol bottles with interaction prompts, while holographic signage glows in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with leather seating and holographic lighting fixtures

events.description: dialogue popup appears indicating in-game communication
turning toward the decorative cabinet with traditional vases

agents.ego_description: moving through the living room past the coffee table and leather couch toward the decorative display

entered.detail: round dark table with magazines and a bowl on top
open magazine with visible text and images on the coffee table
futuristic hanging light fixture with multiple glowing elements
window with closed horizontal blinds showing light from outside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the living room, revealing a leather couch, a coffee table with an open magazine, and a futuristic holographic chandelier. A dialogue notification appears on screen as the camera turns toward a window with blinds and a decorative cabinet.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorative display cabinet with traditional ceramics and candle lighting

events.description: entering area illuminated by warm candlelight instead of neon
slowing to examine the decorative objects on the cabinet

agents.ego_description: slowly panning along the cabinet to examine the traditional vases and candle arrangements in detail

entered.detail: pair of white ceramic vases with blue floral patterns
multiple candles burning with warm orange flames
intricate wooden carved statue of a dragon
large brown ceramic urn with wide base

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on a wooden cabinet adorned with traditional decor, including white porcelain vases with blue patterns, lit candles providing warm ambient light, and an intricately carved wooden dragon statue. The lighting shifts from neon to candlelight as the camera slowly pans across the display.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner with window blinds and retro arcade machine

events.description: interaction prompt appears for item near the arcade machine
stopping near the arcade machine to examine it

agents.ego_description: moving toward the window corner and approaching the illuminated retro arcade cabinet

entered.detail: retro-style arcade cabinet with glowing screen and controls
raised sleeping platform with neon lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a corner of the apartment featuring a window with closed blinds, a retro arcade machine with an illuminated screen, and a bed platform with neon underlighting visible in the background. An interaction prompt appears for an item near the arcade cabinet as the camera approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile confinement of a dimly lit bathroom into a vibrant, neon-soaked cyberpunk living space. It begins with a close-up of a toilet bowl before rising to reveal a glass block wall and a hanging white towel, moving steadily through the doorway. As the camera exits the bathroom, the environment opens into a glowing bar area where the lighting shifts to vibrant neon, passing a counter adorned with a retro radio, a potted plant, and various alcohol bottles. The scene then expands deeper into the living room, gliding past a leather couch and a coffee table with an open magazine under the light of a futuristic holographic chandelier. Finally, the camera turns toward a window with blinds and a decorative cabinet as a dialogue notification appears on screen.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a warm, traditional display of artifacts to a neon-lit corner of a futuristic apartment. It begins by panning across a wooden cabinet where the lighting shifts from neon to the soft glow of candles, illuminating white porcelain vases and an intricately carved wooden dragon statue. As the camera moves away from these traditional elements, the environment opens up to reveal the modern living space. The scene then shifts toward a window with closed blinds and a retro arcade machine with an illuminated screen, before finally approaching the cabinet as a neon-underlit bed platform glows in the background.
